brief.title: The Last Delivery
brief.premise: Every night a small courier robot leaves a package at the same apartment. On its final night before decommissioning, the door finally opens.
brief.visual_style: grounded cinematic realism, controlled lighting, shallow depth of field

plan.title: The Last Delivery
plan.logline: Every night a small courier robot leaves a package at the same apartment. On its final night before decommissioning, the door finally opens.
plan.theme: Hope survives through repeated acts of care.
plan.synopsis: On its final route, a weathered courier robot returns to the one apartment that has never opened. The ritual finally receives an answer.
visual_rules: Cold hallway light contrasts with warm light behind apartment 4B.
The red paper crane stays saturated and legible whenever required.
Mira's green coat and Courier-7's amber light never change.
No generated typography or brand marks inside footage.
audio_rules: Sparse rain ambience leaves space for dialogue.
Courier-7 sounds gentle rather than comic.
Music rises only after the door opens.

characters.name: Mira
characters.role: The resident who stopped opening the door
characters.appearance: late twenties, expressive dark eyes, short black hair
characters.wardrobe: dark forest-green coat over neutral sleepwear
characters.voice_direction: quiet and guarded, then relieved warmth
characters.motivation: to know whether hope can survive being unanswered
characters.reference_prompt: cinematic reference, Mira, short black hair, forest-green coat, consistent face, neutral backdrop

characters.name: Courier-7
characters.role: An aging delivery robot completing its final route
characters.appearance: small weathered cream robot with one amber status light
characters.wardrobe: scratched courier shell, blue route stripe, no logos
characters.voice_direction: gentle synthetic voice, precise but tender
characters.motivation: to complete the promise encoded in its route
characters.reference_prompt: small weathered cream courier robot, amber light, blue stripe, friendly proportions, no logo

beats.name: The final route
beats.objective: Signal that tonight is the robot's last chance

beats.name: The ritual
beats.objective: Establish the unanswered delivery and recurring prop

beats.name: Time accumulated
beats.objective: Show that the robot has returned for years

beats.name: The door opens
beats.objective: Reverse the pattern and reveal Mira

beats.name: Recognition
beats.objective: Deliver the meaning of the repeated route

beats.name: Promise delivered
beats.objective: End on a visual transfer of hope

shots.title: Last route
shots.narrative_objective: Signal that tonight is the robot's last chance
shots.action: Courier-7 rolls into the empty hallway as its amber light falters.
shots.location: narrow apartment hallway at night, rain-lit window at the far end

continuity.location: narrow apartment hallway at night, rain-lit window at the far end

wardrobe.C02: scratched courier shell, blue route stripe, no logos

shots.storyboard_prompt: grounded cinematic realism, controlled lighting, shallow depth of field. Storyboard S01: Courier-7 rolls into the empty hallway as its amber light falters. narrow apartment hallway at night, rain-lit window at the far end. wide establishing shot, knee height, weary determination. Show the environment clearly.
shots.video_prompt: grounded cinematic realism, controlled lighting, shallow depth of field. Courier-7 rolls into the empty hallway as its amber light falters. Camera: slow low dolly, wide establishing shot, knee height. Emotion: weary determination. Preserve wardrobe and props. No logos or on-screen text.
shots.negative_prompt: identity drift, extra fingers, deformed face, illegible text, flicker

shots.narrative_objective: Establish the unanswered delivery and recurring prop

shots.title: You came back
shots.narrative_objective: Deliver the meaning of the repeated route
shots.action: Mira kneels, takes the red paper crane, and meets Courier-7's flickering light.
shots.dialogue:
You came back.
I never stopped.
